context.usage: Spawned after score reaches 200 and moves left at current obstacle speed.

shape.silhouette: Side-profile pterodactyl with long beak, two wing poses, narrow tail, and 2px outline.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 184x80 px with 2 frames arranged in 2 columns and 1 row.
Wing tip travel between frames stays within a 14 px vertical span.
Opaque fill uses #535353 and transparency only.

reference_images.label: pterodactyl_reference
reference_images.purpose: Air obstacle wing cadence and body proportion anchor.

reference_images.label: pixel_art_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Pixel-art outline, low-detail silhouette, and monochrome contrast anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle for static hazards and SpriteSheetBundle for wing-flap obstacles.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacle_pterodactyl_fly_2f_10fps.png through AssetServer and register the handle under obstacle_pterodactyl_fly_2f_10fps.
runtime_notes: Keep source pixels unfiltered with nearest-neighbor sampling and integer world transforms.
Spawn order follows execution_order so downstream setup can validate deterministic asset availability.
Collision and UI code read logical dimensions from specs.dimensions_px rather than texture metadata.
